---
title: "repos setup (removed)"
toc: true
---

`repos setup` has been removed. Its individual steps are now available as
separate commands:

| What you want to do | Command |
|---|---|
| Clone repositories | [`repos clone`](clone.html) |
| Generate VS Code workspace | [`repos workspace`](vscode.html) |
| Configure Codespaces auth | [`repos codespace`](vscode.html) |

See the [VS Code integration guide](vscode.html) for `repos workspace` and
`repos codespace`, and the [repos clone guide](clone.html) for cloning.
